listCustomEquipment.name: Lesser Blastforge Arm
listCustomEquipment.traits: Rare, Mechanical, Artifice, Fire, Explosive, Graft, 3rd Party
listCustomEquipment.description:
The Blastforge Arm is a brutally functional war prosthetic, replacing the arm to the shoulder with iron plating, riveted steel bands, recoil bracing, a three-fingered claw, and a retracting central barrel. Its forearm contains a three-chambered revolving powder cylinder. The arm holds 3 Blastforge Charges; reloading or replacing all charges takes 10 minutes.

Blastforge Charges The arm holds 3 Blastforge Charges. Reloading or replacing all charges takes 10 minutes.
listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Blastforge Shell
Traits Artifice, Fire, Explosive, Manipulate, Strain 3

You launch an explosive shell toward a point within 60 feet. It detonates in a 20-foot burst, dealing 4d6 fire damage with a basic Reflex save. This activation causes you to gain 3 Strain.

listCustomEquipment.name: Lesser Concealed Blade Arm
listCustomEquipment.traits: Mechanical, Artifice, Graft, 3rd Party, Uncommon
listCustomEquipment.description:
The Concealed Blade Arm replaces the user's forearm and hand with a subtle prosthesis built for infiltration and silent killing. It houses a single replaceable integrated blade that functions as a dagger: melee 1d4 piercing; Agile, Finesse, Fatal d10, Concealable, Integrated. The blade can be replaced with a dagger-equivalent blade of a special material during downtime.

Concealment DC 22
Attack Bonus none
Strain 0
listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Unveil Blade
Action 1 action.
Traits Manipulate.

You silently deploy the integrated blade from your wrist. This counts as drawing a weapon.

Retract Blade
Action 1 action.
You retract the blade back into the arm, restoring its normal appearance.

Strain 0

listCustomEquipment.name: Lesser Concealed Whip Arm
listCustomEquipment.traits: Mechanical, Artifice, Graft, 3rd Party, Uncommon
listCustomEquipment.description:
The Concealed Whip Arm replaces the user's arm with a rugged prosthesis containing a coiled integrated whip. The integrated whip has the following profile: melee 1d4 slashing nonlethal; Agile, Disarm, Finesse, Nonlethal, Reach, Trip, Concealable, Integrated.

Reach 10 feet
Concealment DC 20
Trip/Disarm Bonus none
Strain 0
listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Uncoil Whip
Action 1 action.
Traits Manipulate.

The hand retracts into the forearm and the concealed whip rotates into place. This counts as drawing a weapon.

Retract Whip
Action 1 action.
You retract the whip and restore the hand.

listCustomEquipment.name: Lesser Flamberge Arm
listCustomEquipment.traits: Rare, Mechanical, Artifice, Fire, Graft, 3rd Party
listCustomEquipment.description:
The Flamberge Arm replaces the user's arm with a brass prosthesis whose palm conceals an alchemical flame nozzle. The Fuel Reservoir holds 10 charges. Refilling or replacing the reservoir takes 1 minute.

Fuel Reservoir The arm holds 10 charges. Refilling or replacing the reservoir takes 1 minute.
listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Flame Jet
Traits Fire, Manipulate, Strain 2

You expel a torrent of flame in a 15-foot cone, dealing 3d6 fire damage with a basic Reflex save. This activation causes you to gain 2 Strain.

listCustomEquipment.name: Gravem Arm
listCustomEquipment.traits: Unique, Mechanical, Artifice, Gravity, Force, Evocation, Graft, 3rd Party
listCustomEquipment.description: The Gravem Arm is a rare and unstable prototype graft replacing the user's arm entirely up to the shoulder. It uses three tungsten rings and a violet resonance chamber to project a catastrophic gravitic-disintegration beam. The arm uses a resonance core with 2 charges. Each activation consumes 1 charge. Refuelling takes 1 hour and requires 1 Planar Resonance Fragment.
listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Gravem Beam
Traits Artifice, Gravity, Force, Manipulate, Strain 3

Choose a 120-foot line. Each creature in the line attempts a Fortitude save against the Gravem Arm's DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.
Success The creature takes half damage and is not pulled.
Failure The creature takes full damage and is pulled 10 feet toward you.
Critical Failure The creature takes full damage, is pulled 20 feet toward you, and falls prone.

Damage 16d10 force damage.

Annihilation If the beam reduces a creature or object to 0 HP, it is instantly disintegrated into fine grey dust. Only non-magical metal items remain.

This activation causes you to gain 3 Strain.

listCustomEquipment.name: Lesser Multitool Arm
listCustomEquipment.traits: Mechanical, Artifice, Graft, 3rd Party, Uncommon
listCustomEquipment.description:
The Multitool Arm replaces the user's entire arm with a brass prosthesis built around a rotating internal tool carousel. It has 3 internal slots, each of which can hold 1 non-magical toolkit. Installing a toolkit takes 10 minutes and a Crafting check. Installed toolkits cannot be dropped or disarmed and are always considered in hand. Toolkit actions are faster: 2-action tasks become 1 action, 1-minute tasks become 3 rounds, and longer tasks take 75% of normal time. It also includes an ignition spark and an articulated lamp.

Toolkit Install DC Crafting DC 20
Skill Bonus none
Lamp 20 ft bright / 20 ft dim
Strain 0, or 1 for heavy-leverage tasks at GM discretion.
listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Reconfigure Toolkit / Utility Use
Rotate the carousel to bring a different installed toolkit online, ignite flammable material with the ignition spark, or activate/deactivate the articulated lamp. Once per 10 minutes, focusing the lamp grants +1 to the next Crafting or Thievery check involving tiny components.

listCustomEquipment.name: Lesser Silkweaver Arm
listCustomEquipment.traits: Rare, Mechanical, Artifice, Alchemical, Graft, 3rd Party
listCustomEquipment.usage: replaces an arm below the elbow
listCustomEquipment.description:
The Silkweaver Arm is a finely wrought prosthetic that replaces the user's arm from the elbow down. Its fingertips conceal microscopic nozzles that weave alchemical filament into hardened silkweb. The reservoir holds 5 charges. Refilling it takes 10 minutes and requires 1 vial of Silkweaver Reagent.

Reservoir 5 charges. Refilling takes 10 minutes and requires 1 vial of Silkweaver Reagent.
listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Silkweave Lattice
Traits Artifice, Alchemical, Manipulate, Strain 1

Choose a point within 30 feet. A 10-foot burst of hardened silkweb appears there. Creatures in the area attempt a Reflex save against DC 20.

Critical Failure Immobilized for 1 round, then Slowed 1 until freed.
Failure Immobilized until it Escapes (Escape DC 20).
Success Slowed 1 for 1 round.
Critical Success No effect.

The area becomes difficult terrain for 1 minute. Fire destroys the web immediately. This activation consumes 1 reservoir charge.

listCustomEquipment.traits: Rare, Mechanical, Artifice, Alchemical, Graft, 3rd Party

listCustomEquipment.name: Lesser Thunder Lance Arm
listCustomEquipment.traits: Rare, Mechanical, Artifice, Electricity, Graft, 3rd Party
listCustomEquipment.description:
The Thunder Lance replaces the user's arm up to the shoulder with a prosthesis containing an electromagnetic lance-channel. It uses physical javelins as ammunition. A loaded javelin is destroyed only on a critical failure; otherwise it can be retrieved if accessible. Thunder Lance Strikes gain the Deadly d10 trait.

Reload 1 to load 1 javelin.
listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Thunder Lance
Traits Attack, Electricity, Artifice, Manipulate, Strain 2

You make a ranged Strike with a 60-foot range increment using the loaded javelin. The Strike deals 1d6 piercing damage plus 4d6 electricity damage and has the Deadly d10 trait. On a critical failure, the javelin is destroyed. This activation causes you to gain 2 Strain.

listCustomEquipment.name: Moderate Thunder Lance Arm
listCustomEquipment.traits: Rare, Mechanical, Artifice, Electricity, Graft, 3rd Party

listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Thunder Lance

You make a ranged Strike with a 60-foot range increment using the loaded javelin. The Strike deals 1d6 piercing damage plus 6d6 electricity damage and has the Deadly d10 trait. On a critical failure, the javelin is destroyed. This activation causes you to gain 2 Strain.

listCustomEquipment.name: Lesser Grapnel-Hand Arm
listCustomEquipment.traits: Uncommon, Mechanical, Artifice, Graft, 3rd Party
listCustomEquipment.usage: replaces an arm below the elbow
listCustomEquipment.description:
The Grapnel-Hand Arm replaces the user's arm from the elbow down with a bronze-plated prosthesis containing tension gears, recoil springs, a coiled retrieval cable and a fully articulated launchable hand.

Range 30 feet
Weight Limit up to 3 Bulk

Fuel System
Black Powder Charges: 5
Each launch consumes 1 charge.
Refilling: 10 minutes; 1 Black Powder Charge per use restored.

Launch Hand (2 actions)
Attempt an Athletics check with a +1 item bonus. On a success the hand anchors to a surface, or you may attempt to Grapple a creature at range.

Reel In (1 action, Strain 1)
Pull Yourself: move up to 10 feet toward the anchor.
Pull Object: pull an unattended object of up to 3 Bulk.
listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Emergency Catch (Reaction)
Trigger: You or an adjacent ally would fall.

You automatically fire the hand at a nearby anchor point and prevent the fall as though you had successfully Grabbed an Edge. Costs 1 charge and 1 Strain.

listCustomEquipment.name: Moderate Grapnel-Hand Arm
listCustomEquipment.traits: Uncommon, Mechanical, Artifice, Graft, 3rd Party
listCustomEquipment.usage: replaces an arm below the elbow
listCustomEquipment.description:
The Grapnel-Hand Arm replaces the user's arm from the elbow down with a bronze-plated prosthesis containing tension gears, recoil springs, a coiled retrieval cable and a fully articulated launchable hand.

Range 40 feet
Weight Limit up to 5 Bulk

Fuel System
Black Powder Charges: 5
Each launch consumes 1 charge.
Refilling: 10 minutes; 1 Black Powder Charge per use restored.

Launch Hand (2 actions)
Attempt an Athletics check with a +2 item bonus. On a success the hand anchors to a surface, or you may attempt to Grapple a creature at range.

Reel In (1 action, Strain 1)
Pull Yourself: move up to 15 feet toward the anchor.
Pull Object: pull an unattended object of up to 5 Bulk.
Pull Creature: on a successful Grapple, pull the creature 5 feet toward you.
listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Emergency Catch (Reaction)
Trigger: You or an adjacent ally would fall.

You automatically fire the hand at a nearby anchor point and prevent the fall as though you had successfully Grabbed an Edge. Costs 1 charge and 1 Strain.

Range 50 feet
Weight Limit up to 8 Bulk

Fuel System
Black Powder Charges: 5
Each launch consumes 1 charge.
Refilling: 10 minutes; 1 Black Powder Charge per use restored.

Launch Hand (2 actions)
Attempt an Athletics check with a +3 item bonus. On a success the hand anchors to a surface, or you may attempt to Grapple a creature at range.

Reel In (1 action, Strain 1)
Pull Yourself: move up to 20 feet toward the anchor.
Pull Object: pull an unattended object of up to 8 Bulk.
Pull Creature: on a successful Grapple, pull the creature 10 feet toward you.
listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Emergency Catch (Reaction)
Trigger: You or an adjacent ally would fall.

You automatically fire the hand at a nearby anchor point and prevent the fall as though you had successfully Grabbed an Edge. Costs 1 charge and 1 Strain.

listCustomEquipment.name: True Grapnel-Hand Arm
listCustomEquipment.traits: Rare, Mechanical, Artifice, Graft, 3rd Party
listCustomEquipment.usage: replaces an arm below the elbow
listCustomEquipment.description:
The Grapnel-Hand Arm replaces the user's arm from the elbow down with a bronze-plated prosthesis containing tension gears, recoil springs, a coiled retrieval cable and a fully articulated launchable hand.

Range 60 feet
Weight Limit up to 12 Bulk

Fuel System
Black Powder Charges: 5
Each launch consumes 1 charge.
Refilling: 10 minutes; 1 Black Powder Charge per use restored.

Launch Hand (2 actions)
Attempt an Athletics check with a +4 item bonus. On a success the hand anchors to a surface, or you may attempt to Grapple a creature at range.

Reel In (1 action, Strain 1)
Pull Yourself: move up to 30 feet toward the anchor.
Pull Object: pull an unattended object of up to 12 Bulk.
Pull Creature: on a successful Grapple, pull the creature 15 feet toward you.
listCustomEquipment.action0desc:
Emergency Catch (Reaction)
Trigger: You or an adjacent ally would fall.

You automatically fire the hand at a nearby anchor point and prevent the fall as though you had successfully Grabbed an Edge. Costs 1 charge and 1 Strain.

listCustomBuffs.name: Strain
listCustomBuffs.description: Represents accumulated Strain from mechanical grafts and prototype devices. Increase or decrease the stack count as Strain is gained or removed.
